no: Adds Warlock as a new sorcerer-subclass with invocation-based casting. Detects EEex for enhanced actionbar and Bubb's Spell Menu for spell UI. Has Candlekeep Revisited crossmod. Single component with ini configuration.

in.t: Fix DEMNABSU.bcs before installing: decompile, replace all 'CheckStatLT(LastSeenBy(Myself),1,)' with 'CheckStatLT(LastSeenBy(Myself),1,RESISTMAGIC)', recompile to override. EET's BG1 import creates invalid stat references that crash the Warlock mod's DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH.

passive.desc: Ranged attack: 1d6 magic damage at lv1, +1d6 per 3 levels (max 14d6 at lv40). +4 to hit, can crit, no save (MR applies).
Can use Mage scrolls at level 12
Immune to non-magical weapons at level 22

activated.effects: Lv1: Eldritch Blast. Lv3: Hideous Blow (melee). Lv7: Spear (line). Lv9: Glaive (cone melee). Lv11: Chain (bounces). Lv15: Cone (AoE). Lv19: Doom (PBAoE).
4 tiers: Least (11 choices), Lesser (11), Greater (10), Dark (8). Mix of essences (modify blast) and utility (charm, summon, dispel, etc.).

restrictions.armor: chain mail or lighter, bucklers only
restrictions.items: Max 1 proficiency slot in any weapon/style. Pick Pockets only (no other thief skills). Requires DEX 12, CON 12, CHA 16. Hit Die: d6.

hlaPool.note: Custom warlock HLA tree (Eldritch Pact path or Hellfire Pact path)

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot cast mage spells normally. Uses invocation system instead: Least/Lesser/Greater/Dark tier invocations learned via picks every 2 levels. Cannot learn from scrolls.

passive.desc: Ranged attack: 1d6 magic damage at lv1, +1d6 per 3 levels (max 14d6 at lv40). +4 to hit, can crit, no save (MR applies).
Can use Mage scrolls at level 12
Immune to non-magical weapons at level 22

activated.effects: Lv1: Eldritch Blast. Lv3: Hideous Blow (melee). Lv7: Spear (line). Lv9: Glaive (cone melee). Lv11: Chain (bounces). Lv15: Cone (AoE). Lv19: Doom (PBAoE).
4 tiers: Least (11 choices), Lesser (11), Greater (10), Dark (8). Mix of essences (modify blast) and utility (charm, summon, dispel, etc.).

restrictions.armor: chain mail or lighter, bucklers only
restrictions.items: Max 1 proficiency slot in any weapon/style. Pick Pockets only (no other thief skills). Requires DEX 12, CON 12, CHA 16. Hit Die: d6.

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot cast mage spells normally. Uses invocation system instead: Least/Lesser/Greater/Dark tier invocations learned via picks every 2 levels. Cannot learn from scrolls.

new: Arcane caster drawing power from pacts with otherworldly entities. Eldritch blast and invocations.
Warlock variant with different pact focus and invocation selection.

sum: Adds the Warlock as a new class with its own invocation-based spellcasting system and multiple configuration options for spell progression.

co.no: INSTALL FAILURE RESOLVED: The DECOMPILE_AND_PATCH errors on demon scripts (DEMNABSU, DEMPITSU) and A7!GXRU were caused by Golem Construction installing BEFORE Spell Revisions. GC compiled BCS scripts with Detectable Spells stats (WIZARD_SPELL_IMMUNITY etc), then SR modified stats.ids removing those entries, leaving orphaned stat numbers. Moving GC to POST-TACTICAL TWEAKS fixes this. The Warlock mod itself is EET compatible — the issue was install order of other mods.

advisories.reason: Both add sorcerer variants. Should coexist as separate kits but ToF's sorcerer revisions may interact with Warlock's casting system.
